# Moltbot

> Moltbot is a managed AI assistant service. Get your own private Claude instance deployed on a dedicated cloud server, connected to all your communication channels, and fully managed.

Moltbot runs on Claude by Anthropic. It provides 24/7 AI assistance that remembers context across conversations, responds on email, Slack, WhatsApp, Discord, SMS, and Telegram. Zero technical setup required - the service handles deployment, updates, and monitoring.

## Main Pages

- / : Homepage - Overview of Moltbot service, features, and how it works
- /pricing : Pricing plans and what's included
- /waitlist : Join the waitlist for early access

## Features

- Dedicated Claude instance on private cloud server
- Multi-channel support (Email, Slack, WhatsApp, Discord, SMS, Telegram)
- Enterprise security with SOC 2 compliant infrastructure
- 24/7 availability with persistent context
- Fully managed - no technical setup needed
